title: MetabaseSourceMetadata
description: Metadata identifying a Metabase database for this service in this environment.

database.description: Metabase database name as shown in the Metabase admin UI (human label).

database_id.description: Metabase numeric database ID — sent as the `database` field in /api/dataset payloads. This is what the API actually consumes.

database_type.description: Database engine. Picks the dialect-specific pre-query recipe at docs/metabase_<database_type>_pre_query so the planner can introspect indexes/columns before writing optimized SQL.

schema.description: Schema name. Used to qualify table refs as `schema.table` in SQL queries (e.g. `cdcn_log_central.log_central`).

tables.description: Tables the service may query in this database/schema. Acts as an allow-list for query planners.
